# Elite Spine & Sports Care — Paramus, NJ

> Elite Spine & Sports Care is a physical therapy and chiropractic clinic in Paramus, New Jersey. The practice offers one-on-one, doctor-led care combining physical therapy, chiropractic care, shockwave therapy, dry needling, Active Release Technique (ART), Graston Technique, deep tissue laser therapy, and massage therapy for back pain, neck pain, sciatica, herniated discs, sports injuries, and post-operative rehabilitation.

Most insurance plans are accepted, including Medicare and major commercial plans. New patients can book online or call the office.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.elitespineparamus.com/): Overview of the clinic, services, patient reviews, location, and contact details
- [Conditions & Services](https://www.elitespineparamus.com/conditions-services): Full list of conditions treated and treatment techniques offered
- [Our Team](https://www.elitespineparamus.com/team): Doctors and clinical staff profiles
- [Insurance](https://www.elitespineparamus.com/insurance): Accepted insurance plans and coverage information
- [Blog](https://www.elitespineparamus.com/blog): Patient education articles on pain relief, recovery, and injury prevention

## Contact

- Location: Paramus, New Jersey (Bergen County)
- Booking: [Zocdoc profile](https://www.zocdoc.com/practice/elite-spine-and-sports-care-60454)
